pass1_value.note: SP-API uses Login with Amazon (LWA) (OAuth 2.0) to obtain access tokens and requires requests to be signed with AWS Signature Version 4 (AWS IAM credentials). 'other' represents AWS SigV4 signing using AWS access keys.

final_value.note: SP-API uses Login with Amazon (LWA) OAuth 2.0 to obtain access tokens and requires all SP-API requests to be signed with AWS Signature Version 4 (SigV4) using AWS IAM credentials; 'other' represents the SigV4 request-signing requirement.
